title: UK/Singapore: Amendment to the Air Services Agreement [TS No.28/2025]
body: "Published title: Amendment to the Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Singapore concerning Air Services, done at Singapore on 21 August 2007 and to the Memorandum of Understanding between the Aeronautical Authorities of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Republic of Singapore, signed on 28 September 2022. "
